infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to find nearby jobs and drivers.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: We need your location to track delivery routes and job locations.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: We need your location to provide job recommendations and track deliveries.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We need camera access to take photos for profile and job documentation.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We need photo library access to upload images for your profile.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: We need permission to save photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: We need calendar access to schedule jobs.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: We need reminders access to set job notifications.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: We use motion data to track your activity during deliveries.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow JOBSITEX to use your location for job recommendations and delivery tracking.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow JOBSITEX to use your location even when the app is in the background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow JOBSITEX to use your location while you are using the app.

plugins.photosPermission: The app needs access to your photos to upload profile pictures and job images.
plugins.cameraPermission: The app needs access to your camera to take photos for profiles and jobs.
